返回本批次

Lidl 的太阳能电池板？插件版本将出现在商店中

Solar panels at Lidl? Plug-in versions set to appear in shops

www.thisismoney.co.uk 作者 ZeljkoS 分数 46 评论 80 2026/04/01 16:36
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 在 Lidl 中间过道浏览的购物者很快就可以购买太阳能电池板，因为政府现在将允许超市销售插电式生态设备。据称，家庭将在几个月内从超市以及亚马逊等零售商处购买面板。英国现行法规不允许使用此类设备。但部长们已承诺与监管机构 Ofgem 和其他官方机构合作，减少家庭使用这些插入式面板的繁文缛节，而无需电工。能源安全和净零部声称，这些面板通常用在阳台上，每年可为家庭节省高达 110 英镑的能源费用。最近几周，中东战争引发石油和天然气价格飙升，导致该国能源安全陷入混乱，导致能源费用预测飙升。根据咨询公司 Cornwall Insight 的数据，7 月份典型家庭的账单预计每年将上涨约 332 英镑，达到 1,973 英镑。插入式电池板：商店将在“数月”内开始备货易于安装的太阳能电池板。由于供应商希望保护自己的利润，一些最便宜的固定费率能源交易已从市场上撤出。但政府能源沙皇埃德·米利班德已承诺加快“清洁和本土”能源计划，以应对冲突。想要远离易受市场波动影响的化石燃料能源的生态家庭可以安装传统太阳能电池板。他们利用日光发电为您的家庭提供能源，这意味着您的家人将减少对昂贵的化石燃料能源的依赖。但根据节能信托基金的数据，它们的安装成本很高，平均约为 6,000 英镑，每年可节省 350 英镑的电费。因此，尽管有可能节省成本，但一些家庭还是会回避这种购买，因为安装面板需要前期数千英镑。然而，这些插入式版本要便宜得多，可以放在阳台或花园等户外空间，而不是永久固定在屋顶上。它们可以像任何其他电子设备一样插入电源插座，为家庭提供免费的太阳能。这些更便宜的版本已经在其他欧洲国家上市。例如，在德国，每年插入近 50 万台新设备。政府表示，这项技术“易于安装”，并将让消费者“大幅削减能源费用”。虽然这些新型家用面板的潜在成本尚不清楚，但在德国，家庭预计要花 449 至 2,761 欧元购买宜家的阳台插件套件。然而，一个小型面板的成本约为 200 欧元。Lidl 和亚马逊等受欢迎的零售商以及太阳能制造商 EcoFlow 正在与政府进行谈判，以“使它们[插入式太阳能电池板]能够进入英国市场。Lidl GB 的 Georgina Hall 表示：“在 Lidl GB，我们致力于让每个人都能负担得起可持续的生活，我们欢迎政府采取的举措，使英国的法规现代化。“为此更新监管环境“即插即用”技术是赋予英国家庭管理能源成本和支持国家净零目标的积极一步。”EcoFlow 的洛娜·华莱士·史密斯补充道：“允许即插即用太阳能是扩大英国可再生能源获取的非常积极的一步。到夏天看到这些系统在商店上市对家庭来说将是一个重大胜利，使人们能够利用更长、更明亮的日子并立即开始自己生产清洁电力。即插即用系统消除了这一障碍，使入门变得更加容易。有了明确的标准和正确的监管框架，英国现在有一个真正的机会，为数百万家庭提供可用的太阳能——正好赶上夏季。这项新措施是与未来住宅标准一起公布的，该标准将从 2028 年起强制要求大多数新建住宅安装太阳能电池板和热泵。能源大臣埃德·米利班德表示：“伊朗战争再次表明，我们对清洁能源的追求对于我们的能源安全至关重要，这样我们就可以摆脱我们无法控制的化石燃料市场的控制。”作为新房的标准或让人们可以在商店购买插入式太阳能，我们决心推出清洁能源，这样我们就可以赋予我们国家能源主权。

Original Summary

  1. Shoppers browsing in Lidl's middle aisle could soon be able to buy solar panels, as the Government will now allow supermarkets to sell plug-in versions of the eco devices. Households will be able to buy the panels from supermarkets as well as retailers such as Amazon within months, it said.Current UK regulations don’t allow such a device to be used. But ministers have pledged to work with regulator Ofgem and other official bodies to slash red tape to households to use these plug-in panels without the need for an electrician.The panels, which are often used on balconies, can save families up to £110 a year on their energy bills, the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero claimed. It comes as the country’s energy security has been thrown into disarray in recent weeks as the war in the Middle East has triggered a surge in oil and gas prices.It has caused energy bill forecasts to soar. Bills for the typical household are expected to climb by some £332 a year in July to £1,973, according to consultancy Cornwall Insight. Plug-in panels: Shops to start stocking easy to install solar panels within 'months'And some of the cheapest fixed-rate energy deals have been swiped from the market as providers look to protect their bottom line.But the Government energy tsar Ed Miliband has pledged to speed up plans for ‘clean and homegrown’ energy in response to the conflict.Eco households who want to distance themselves from fossil fuel energy, which is susceptible to market fluctuations, can install traditional solar panels.They use daylight to create electricity for your home, which means your family will be less reliant on expensive fossil fuel energy to power your lives.But they are expensive to install – around £6,000 on average, with £350 a year in energy bill savings, according to Energy Saving Trust. So despite the potential savings, some families shy away from such a purchase due to the thousands of pounds needed upfront to install the panels.These plug-in versions, however, are far cheaper and can be put on a balcony or in an outdoor space such as a garden instead of being fixed permanently on a roof.They can be plugged into a mains socket like any other electronic device to provide a home with free solar power.These cheaper versions are already available in other European countries. In Germany, for example, almost half a million new devices are plugged in every year.The Government says this technology is ‘easy to install’ and will allow consumers to ‘significantly cut energy bills’.While the potential cost of these new at-home panels is not yet known, in Germany families can expect to shell out anywhere from €449 to €2,761 for one of the balcony plug-in kits from Ikea. A small panel, however, costs around €200.Popular retailers such as Lidl and Amazon, as well as solar energy manufacturer, EcoFlow are in talks with the Government to ‘enable them [plug-in solar panels] to be brought to the UK market.Georgina Hall, of Lidl GB, says: ‘At Lidl GB, we are committed to making sustainable living affordable for everyone and we welcome the Government’s move to modernise regulations in the UK.‘Updating the regulatory landscape for this ‘plug-and-play’ technology is a positive step towards empowering British households to manage their energy costs and support the nation’s net-zero ambitions.’Lorna Wallace-Smith, of EcoFlow, added: ‘Allowing plug-and-play solar is a very positive step for expanding access to renewable energy in the UK. Seeing these systems available in stores by summer would be a major win for households, enabling people to take advantage of the longer, brighter days and start generating their own clean electricity straight away.‘For many households - particularly those living in flats or rented homes - solar has not always been straightforward. Plug-and-play systems remove that barrier, making it far easier to get started. With clear standards and the right regulatory framework, the UK now has a real opportunity to bring accessible solar to millions more homes - just in time for summer.’This new measure has been revealed alongside the Future Homes Standard, which will make solar panels and heat pumps compulsory for most new-build homes from 2028. Energy Secretary Ed Miliband says: ‘The Iran War has once again shown our drive for clean power is essential for our energy security so we can escape the grip of fossil fuel markets we don’t control.‘Whether through solar panels fitted as standard on new homes or making it possible for people to purchase plug-in solar in shops, we are determined to roll out clean power so we can give our country energy sovereignty.’

评论（默认中文）

jstsch 2026/04/01 19:46
每块安装的光伏电池板都减少了大气中十几桶石油（当量）的二氧化碳排放。 另外，自己发电非常有趣！强烈推荐它，即使从小做起。

虽然它很容易上瘾。我住在市中心（荷兰海牙），拥有家用电池，现在一年中 10 个月的电力可以 100% 自给自足。

Every installed PV-panel is a dozen barrels of oil (eq.) less CO2 in the atmosphere. Plus, so much fun to generate your own power! Can highly recommend it, even starting small.

It's addictive though. Living in the center of the city (The Hague, NL), with a home battery, I'm now 100% self-sufficient electrically for 10 months of the year.

在 HN 中查看
SCHiM 2026/04/01 20:09
嘿 jstsch，你介意回答一些问题吗？

- 您需要/使用电工来设置吗？ - 你们的电池容量是多少千瓦时？ - 消防安全怎么样？你是安装在室外还是室内？ - 我认为十二月/一月是你不能完全自给自足的月份，你是否可以从电网充电以随着时间的推移进行套利，或者这是另一个蠕虫病毒？

Hey jstsch, would you mind answering some questions?

- Did you need/use an electrician to set this up? - How much KWh capacity do your batteries have? - What about fire safety? Did you install outside, or inside? - I assume dec/jan are the months you're not fully self-sufficient, are you allowed to charge from grid to do arbitrage over time, or is that another can of worms?

在 HN 中查看
jstsch 2026/04/01 21:27
主要是我自己设置的。一些具体的任务，例如将三相电源引入车库并连接断路器箱，我与电工一起完成了这些任务。但是，在断路器箱内安装额外的电路或安装新的导管，您自己可以轻松安全地完成。预接线断路器盒可以在线配置，而且价格便宜。

电池容量为16kWh。有效电量约为 14kWh，因为您永远不会完全放电。 LiFePo4，因此不会像其他化学电池那样发生自燃。

我想说 11 月→2 月是很棘手的，尽管因为我有相当多的过剩太阳能容量，所以即使在 12 月也有很多天电池可以让我度过夜晚。

从电网充电/放电是可能的，因为我有一个改装逆变器（交流电到电池），但还没有这样做，必须做更多的研究（动态定价，税收>荷兰千瓦时价格的50％等）。

Set it up myself, mostly. Some specific tasks like bringing three-phase power to the garage and hooking up the breaker box I did with an electrician. But installing an additional circuit inside the breaker box, or putting new conduit up, is easy to do safely yourself. Pre-wired breaker boxes can be configured online and are cheap.

The battery is 16kWh. Effectively around 14kWh, since you never fully discharge. LiFePo4, so no chance of spontaneous combustion like other battery chemistries.

I'd say the months Nov→Feb are tricky, although since I have quite a bit of excess solar capacity there are even in December plenty of days where the battery pulls me through the night.

Charging/discharging from/to the grid is possible, since I have a retrofit inverter (AC to battery), but not doing it yet, have to do a bit more research (dynamic pricing, tax is >50% of the kWh price in NL, etc).

在 HN 中查看
pjc50 2026/04/01 22:30
> 但是，您可以轻松、安全地在断路器箱内安装附加电路或安装新导管。

英国具体注意事项：请注意，自 2013 年“P 部分”建筑法规发生变化以来，除了微不足道的更换之外，几乎所有电气工作都属于非法 DIY。此外，可再生能源工作需要 额外的 MCS认证。

这就是为什么阳台太阳能很划算，它不需要这些。

> But installing an additional circuit inside the breaker box, or putting new conduit up, is easy to do safely yourself.

UK specific note: note that since the changes in 2013 under the ""Part P"" building regulations, almost all electrical work other than trivial replacement is illegal to DIY. Additionally, renewables work requires extra MCS certification.

Which is why balcony solar is a good deal, it requires none of that.

在 HN 中查看
leonidasrup 2026/04/01 19:59
制造和运输光伏电池板需要多少桶石油（当量）？
How many barrels of oil (eq.) are required to manufacture and transport the PV panel?
在 HN 中查看
muskstinks 2026/04/01 20:07
据估计，光伏电池板平均两年即可实现二氧化碳中和。

最棒的是：这仅适用于面板是用化石燃料生产的。因此，由于各地绿色能源的增加，这个数字也下降了，光伏发电可以轻松使用 15 年及之后。之后，再投资一套新的光伏电池板可能会更经济，而旧的光伏电池板可以出售并在其他地方使用。

Its estimated that a PV panel is co2 neutral aver 2 years.

And the great thing is: this is only if the panel was produced with fossil fuels. So due to increase in green energy everywere, this number goes down too and a PV can easily be used for 15 years and after. After that it might just be more economicly to reinvest in a new set of PV panels while the old ones can be sold and used somewere else.

在 HN 中查看
kstenerud 2026/04/01 20:08
石油回收期（就面板和相关齿轮而言）约为 1.5 年，使用寿命为 25-30 年。

这就是今天的效率。他们当然正在进步。

The oil payback (in terms of the panel and associated gear) is about 1.5 years, with a 25-30 year lifetime operating window.

This is with today's efficiencies. They are of course improving.

在 HN 中查看
_aavaa_ 2026/04/01 20:07
少于制造和运输它所取代的石油桶所需的时间。
Less than it takes to manufacture and transports the barrels of oils it replaces.
在 HN 中查看
projektfu 2026/04/01 20:15
大约是面板输出的 1/10 左右，例如输入 1 桶能源制造和运输面板可节省 10 桶化石燃料能源。 这是一个粗略的数字，假设使用特定的石油能源组合，并且没有能源成本来采购比较中使用的化石燃料。
About 1/10 or so of the output of the panel, e.g. 1 barrel of input energy making and transporting panels saves 10 barrels in fossil fuel energy. That's a rough number assuming a particular mix of oil based energy and no energy cost to procuring the fossil fuels used in the comparison.
在 HN 中查看
guntars 2026/04/01 20:06
如果您对此感到好奇，为什么不去寻找答案，然后也告诉我们，不是吗？
If you are curious about it, why don’t you go and find the answer and then let us know too, no?

ceejayoz 2026/04/01 20:11
这是一个新帐户，自成立以来只发布了支持核能和反对太阳能/风能的内容。
It’s a new account that has posted only pro nuclear and anti solar/wind stuff since its inception.
在 HN 中查看
leonidasrup 2026/04/01 22:15
你既对又错。

很久以前，当德国西门子还在建设核电站时，我就在核电站工程部门工作。 2022 年俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后，天然气短缺和随之而来的成本上涨重新燃起了我对能源行业的兴趣。即使欧洲爆发战争，德国为何不改变其反核立场？

德国民众和决策者是否普遍缺乏能源物理、技术和经济方面的知识？

阅读丹尼尔·格拉伯（Daniel Gräber）的《Akte Nuclear Phaseout》后，政治方面变得更加清晰。

https://www.perlentaucher.de/buch/daniel-graeber/akte-atomau...

来自石油和天然气行业的一点钱总是有帮助的。

https://correctiv.org/en/latest-stories/2022/10/07/gazprom-l...

https://www.politico.eu/article/robert-habeck-germany-qatar-...

我认为太阳能和风能是有趣的技术（太阳能几乎是神奇的——将掺杂硅薄层内的光子转变为电子），但其本身不足以为现代世界提供动力。它们是间歇性的、依赖天气且密度低。是的，太阳和风不依赖于太阳，但转换能量、储存能量和分配能量的机器则不然。必须开采矿物、建造机器、运输、安装，然后处理掉。

推荐阅读：

大卫·约翰·卡梅伦·麦凯爵士的《可持续能源——没有热空气》

https://withouthotair.com/

瓦茨拉夫·斯米尔的书籍：

能源与文明：历史

能源转型：全球和国家视角

世界是如何运转的

“核电为何失败”——21世纪的棘手难题

https://gordianknotbook.com/

按照目前的消耗速度，仍然有大量的碳氢化合物储量，天然气/石油至少可以使用 100 年，煤炭可以使用 200 年。我担心，如果我们不使用唯一的无碳高密度能源，并将我们的希望寄托在可再生能源的幻想上，我们的大气就会变成地狱。

当石油和天然气巨头都在宣传可再生能源时，你就知道可再生能源永远不会取代化石燃料。

“天然气是可再生能源的完美合作伙伴”

https://totalenergies.com/news/news/natural-gas-integral-par...

You are both right and wrong at the same time.

Long time ago when Siemens in Germany was still building nuclear power plants, I was working in the nuclear power plant engineering department. After the year 2022 when the Russia invaded Ukraine, the gas shortages and the following costs hikes renewed my interest energy sector. Why didn't German reverse it's anti-nuclear stance, even with war in Europe?

Was is the general lack of knowledge of physical, technological and economical aspects of energy, both in German population and decision makers?

The political aspect became clearer after reading "Akte Atomausstieg" by Daniel Gräber.

https://www.perlentaucher.de/buch/daniel-graeber/akte-atomau...

Little bit of money from oil and gas industry always helps.

https://correctiv.org/en/latest-stories/2022/10/07/gazprom-l...

https://www.politico.eu/article/robert-habeck-germany-qatar-...

I think solar and wind are interesting technologies, (solar almost magical - turning photons of light inside thin layer of doped silicon into electrons) but by itself insufficient to power modern world. They are intermittent, weather dependent and low density. Yes the sun and wind come free from Sun, the machines that convert the energy, store it and distribute it are not. Minerals have to be mined, machines build, transported, installed and then disposed off.

Recommended reading:

"Sustainable Energy – Without the Hot Air" by Sir David John Cameron MacKay

https://withouthotair.com/

Books by Vaclav Smil:

Energy and Civilization: A History

Energy Transitions: Global and National Perspectives

How the World Really Works

"Why Nuclear Power Has Been A Flop" - The Gordian Knot of the 21st Century

https://gordianknotbook.com/

There are still big hydrocarbon reserves, gas/oil for atleast 100 years, coal 200 years, at current consumption rates. I fear that, if we don't use the only carbon free high density energy source and cling our hopes to the mirage of renewables, we will transform our atmosphere to hell.

When even the oil and gas giants advertise for renewables, you know that renewables will never replace fossil fuels.

"gas the perfect partner for renewable energies"

https://totalenergies.com/news/news/natural-gas-integral-par...

在 HN 中查看
pjc50 2026/04/01 22:24
真正的问题是“为什么核武者如此拼命反对可再生能源（因此默认支持化石燃料）？”全核未来在20世纪70年代迎来了辉煌时刻，并已被全面淘汰。只有法国接近。

> 转换能量、储存能量和分配能量的机器则不然。必须开采矿物、建造机器、运输、安装，然后处理掉

这当然也是反对核电的一个有效论据。

The real question is "why are nukemen so desperately against renewables (and therefore by default in favor of fossil fuels)?" The all-nuclear future had its moment in the sun in the 70s and has been comprehensively lapped. Only France came close.

> the machines that convert the energy, store it and distribute it are not. Minerals have to be mined, machines build, transported, installed and then disposed off

This is of course also a valid argument against nuclear power.

在 HN 中查看
leonidasrup 2026/04/02 04:03
https://davidturver.substack.com/p/material-intensity-electr...

https://www.iea.org/reports/the-role-of-critical-minerals-in...

https://world-nuclear.org/information-library/energy-and-the...

https://davidturver.substack.com/p/material-intensity-electr...

https://www.iea.org/reports/the-role-of-critical-minerals-in...

https://world-nuclear.org/information-library/energy-and-the...

在 HN 中查看
jstsch 2026/04/02 02:47
我不喜欢“能源宗教”。核能对于欧洲来说是必要的。我们根本无法在冬天用可再生能源为我们的房屋供暖并为我们的工业提供动力。同时，风能和光伏发电可以更快地建立起来，而且成本低廉。在地形和当地生物条件允许的情况下进行水力发电。我们需要所有这些技术，这样我们才能摆脱化石（气候、恢复力和枯竭）。
I dislike ‘energy religion’. Nuclear is necessary for Europe. We simply can’t heat our homes and power our industry with renewables in winter. At the same time wind and pv can be built up faster and is simply cheap. Hydro where topography and local bio conditions allow it. We need all those technologies, so we can move away from fossil (climate, resilience and depletion).
在 HN 中查看
jacknews 2026/04/01 20:04
随着整个世界的电气化，越来越少。
Fewer and fewer, as the whole world electrifies.
在 HN 中查看
Epa095 2026/04/01 20:12
太阳能电池板的碳回收期通常为 1-4 年。
The usual carbon payback period for solar panels is 1-4 years.

yenepho 2026/04/01 20:08
我认为（显然）OP在这里暗示了净保存。
I think (obviously) the OP is implying a net save here.

Fokamul 2026/04/01 20:05
这是第三世界国家的问题，英国人（工资在欧洲名列前茅）必须省钱！
That's 3rd world country problem, British people (with salary in top places of Europe) must save money!

pch00 2026/04/01 20:14
英国的电力在世界上排名第八[1]，英国人尝试在发电方面更加自给自足似乎是谨慎的做法？

[1] https://worldpopulationreview.com/country-rankings/cost-of-e...

Britain has the 8th-most expensive electricity in the world[1], seems prudent that a Brit would try to be more self-sufficient in terms of generation?

[1] https://worldpopulationreview.com/country-rankings/cost-of-e...

Fokamul 2026/04/01 21:25
好的。

在你的地图上，假设来源有效，英国有 0.4 美元。 我来自 CZ，我们有 0.35 美元。

英国的工资中位数是双倍以上。这意味着在某些城市，它实际上会小 2 倍或 3 倍。但这里全国的电价都差不多。

别跟我说什么费电又省钱的事。因为最重要的是，让我们检查经济适用房的统计数据

https://worldpopulationreview.com/country-rankings/affordabl...

是的，欧盟最糟糕的国家之一，是的。

Ok.

On your map, let's say the source is valid, UK has $0.4. I'm from CZ, we have $0.35.

UK has more than double median salary, DOUBLE. Which means that in some cities it will be actually more like 2x or 3x smaller. But price of electricity is more or less same in the whole country here.

Don't tell me something about expensive electricity and saving money. Because on top of that, let's check affordable housing stats

https://worldpopulationreview.com/country-rankings/affordabl...

Yep, one of the worst in EU, yaay.

在 HN 中查看
kleiba 2026/04/01 20:04
在 Lidl 的发源地德国，您已经可以在他们的商店在线订购。这是适合您阳台的多种选择： https://www.lidl.de/p/vale-gmbh-balkonkraftwerk-ecoflow-860-...

产品特点：

- 名称：VALE MiniPV 880-EF8N

- 控制：免费应用程序

- 通讯：WiFi 2.4 GHz

性能：最大。 800瓦

- 张力：约。 230伏

- 频率：50 赫兹

- 电源：太阳能输入：高达 60 V，电源电流 230 V

- 防护等级：IP67

- 材质：太阳能模块：玻璃和铝框

- 逆变器：铸铝

- 尺寸：约。长 172.2 x 宽 113.4 x 高 3 厘米（每个太阳能模块） 约。长 25.3 x 宽 22.2 x 高 3.5 厘米（逆变器）

- 重量：约。 56公斤

- 供货范围：2 x 高级太阳能电池板，每块 440WP，黑色，双面； 1 x 高级逆变器 800 瓦，带 WiFi； 1 x 连接电缆 (5 m)、安全插头；快速入门指南

In Germany, where Lidl is originally from, you can already order them online in their store. This is a variety for your balcony: https://www.lidl.de/p/vale-gmbh-balkonkraftwerk-ecoflow-860-...

Product Features:

- Name: VALE MiniPV 880-EF8N

- Control: Free App

- Communication: WiFi 2.4 GHz

- Performance: max. 800 W

- Tension: approx. 230 V

- Frequency: 50 Hz

- Power supply: Solar inputs: up to 60 V, mains current 230 V

- Protection rating: IP67

- Material: Solar modules: glass and aluminium frame

- Inverter: Cast aluminium

- Dimensions: approx. L 172.2 x W 113.4 x H 3 cm (per solar module) approx. L 25,3 x W 22.2 x H 3.5 cm (inverter)

- Weight: approx. 56 kg

- Scope of delivery: 2 x Premium solar panels, each 440WP, Black, Bifazial; 1 x Premium inverter 800 Watt with WiFi; 1 x connection cable (5 m), safety plug; Quick start guide

在 HN 中查看
raphaelj 2026/04/01 19:53
去年我们在比利时将这些合法化。

去年夏天，我以 +/- 1300 欧元的价格购买了一套 1600Wc + 1.9KWh 套件（Ecoflow Stream）。我们花了大约 2 小时安装（我们必须在外面安装一个新插头），自 7 月以来我已经节省了 200 欧元以上。我预计每年可节省约 350 欧元。

另外，正如 u/jstch 所说，设置和生成自己的能量非常有趣！

We legalized these in Belgium last year.

I bought a 1600Wc + 1.9KWh kit (Ecoflow Stream) for +/- 1300€ last summer. It took us about 2h to install (we had to setup a new plug outside), and I already saved 200€+ since July. I am expecting to save about 350€ per year.

Also, as u/jstch said, it's extremely fun to setup and generate your own power!

在 HN 中查看
modo_mario 2026/04/01 21:26
需要去认证一下吗？我认为比利时DIY阳台面板的限制大约是800W。
Did you need to get it certified? I think the limit for DIY balcony panels here in Belgium was about 800W.
在 HN 中查看
raphaelj 2026/04/01 23:49
它是 800W，但电池允许它缓冲多余的功率，并且永远不会输出超过法定限制。
It is 800W, but the battery allows it to buffer the excess and never output more than the legal limit.
在 HN 中查看
gib444 2026/04/01 19:57
3.7 年的投资回报率将是令人难以置信的（而且 AIUI 相当罕见）

朝南？

A 3.7 year ROI would be incredible (and fairly uncommon AIUI)

South facing?

在 HN 中查看
raphaelj 2026/04/01 20:07
房子朝南，但出于经济和美观的原因，我将它们平放在地板上，并放置了一些 3D 打印的砖基镇流器 [1]。

购买光伏支架实际上比购买额外的光伏电池板更经济。

--

[1] https://imgur.com/a/tDPevmM

House is facing South, but I'm laying them flat on the floor for economic and aesthetic reasons, with some 3D printed brick-based ballast [1].

Buying supports for PV is actually less economical than buying additional PV panels.

--

[1] https://imgur.com/a/tDPevmM

在 HN 中查看
muskstinks 2026/04/01 20:11
我的大约四年了，它是西南方+中间有一棵树。所以春季和秋季这棵树没有问题，但在夏季午餐高峰期，树上会有阴影。
Mine was around 4 years and its west south + a tree in the middle. So spring and autom the tree is no problem but in summer lunch hpeak there is shadow on it.
在 HN 中查看
Fokamul 2026/04/01 20:12
它在那里如何运作？

您有特殊的电表，并且您正在将太阳能分配到您家庭之外的电网中？

或者您不将电力输送到电网？

And how does it work there?

You have special electric meter and you are distributing solar power into the grid outside of your household?

Or you don't distribute electricity into the grid?

在 HN 中查看
pjc50 2026/04/01 20:21
“阳台太阳能”的特殊定义是它避免了大部分这些要求。这似乎通常是通过在房屋的输入端添加钳形表来完成的，钳形表通过 Wifi 向面板逆变器发送控制信号，以减少输出（如果有反馈）。

（这取决于国家/地区）

The special definition of "balcony solar" is that it avoids most of those requirements. It seems this is usually done by adding a clamp meter to the input to the house, which sends a control signal to the panel inverter over Wifi to reduce output if it would be feeding back.

(this is country dependent)

在 HN 中查看
raphaelj 2026/04/01 20:18
您必须向公用事业公司注册，但这只是一个填写套件型号和功率的表格。

使用电表，当您产生盈余时，您将获得补偿（+/- €0.04/kWh 我上次检查时）。

然而，多亏了电池，我几乎自己消耗了所有的电力，节省了大约 0.30 欧元/千瓦时。

预计每 1kW 电池板的年产量为 800kWh。

You have to register to the utility, but that's just a form to fill with the model and power of the kit.

With a e-meter, you will get compensated when you're generating a surplus (+/- €0.04/kWh last time I checked).

However, thanks to the battery, I'm self-consuming almost all that electricity, saving around €0.30/kWh.

Expect 800kWh of annual production per 1kW of panels.

在 HN 中查看
ragebol 2026/04/01 20:28
我作为一个荷兰人的猜测，不是 100% 熟悉我们邻国的规则等）： 是的，导出到网格。如果房子有一个旧的法拉利仪表，它会向后旋转，或者一个新的、智能的仪表，它有一个单独的计数器用于返回电网。
My guess as a Dutch guy, not 100% familiar with our neighboring country's rules etc): Yes, exporting to the grids. If a house has an old Ferraris meter, it will rotate backwards or a new, smart(er) meter, that has a separate counter for delivery back to the grid.
在 HN 中查看
Klaster_1 2026/04/01 19:50
伙计，如果我们当地的塞浦路斯法规允许的话，我会毫不犹豫地购买这些。作为移民租房者参与绿色转型很糟糕。
Man, I'd buy these in a heartbeat if our local Cyprus regulations allowed for these. Participating in green transition as an immigrant renter sucks.
在 HN 中查看
rickydroll 2026/04/01 21:26
请咨询您当地的公用事业公司。在这里（美国马萨诸塞州），我们无法运行经典的阳台太阳能（​​当您生产的量超过消耗量时为电网供电）。但我们可以运行零出口太阳能（不向电网供电，但当生产量超过消耗量时回拨逆变器）。

电池支持的零出口太阳能背后的经济学很有趣，因为它们使您当地的太阳能保持在本地，并且您可以从系统中获取最大的利益。此外，如果您有足够的电池和 TOD 费率用于电网供电，您可以在电网能源便宜时（过夜）存储电网能源，并在电网能源昂贵时在本地使用。

我们当地的公用事业公司国家电网有一个计划，如果你有合适的逆变器-电池组合，他们会在高峰负载期间向你购买电力，你一年可以赚到几万美元。

电池，尤其是本地电池，改变了发电和使用的动态。这是令人惊奇和美妙的。

Check with your local utility. Here, (MA, USA), we can't run classic balcony solar (feeds the grid when you produce more than you consume). But we can run zero-export solar (never feeding the grid, but dialing back the inverter when you produce more than you consume).

The economics behind battery-backed zero-export solar are interesting because they keep your local solar energy local, and you can extract maximum benefit from the system. Also, if you have enough batteries and TOD rates for grid power, you can store grid energy when it's cheap (overnight) and use it locally when it's expensive.

Our local utility, National Grid, has a program where, if you have the right inverter-battery combination, they will buy power from you during peak-load periods, and you can make a couple of grand a year.

Batteries, especially local ones, change the dynamics of power generation and use. It's amazing and wonderful.

在 HN 中查看
raddan 2026/04/01 20:45
紧急救援人员如何关闭面板？在我住的地方，太阳能系统需要有一个关闭开关。例如，我的系统在房子的一侧安装了一个红色的大手柄。这不仅对于消防员等急救人员很重要，而且对于修复倒塌电线的线路工也很重要，这在我居住的地方（山区农村地区）很常见。

鉴于这些商店购买的面板被插入室内交流电，因此它们具有内置逆变器。许多并网逆变器都是“电网跟随”的，这意味着它们会根据电网频率/相位进行自我调整。所以，只是在这里推测......也许逆变器会感应到电源何时关闭并自行关闭？我很想从 EE 那里了解安全方面实际发生的情况。

How does panel shut-off work for emergency responders? Where I live, a solar energy system is required to have a shut off switch. For example, my system has a big red handle mounted on the side of the house. This is important not just for first responders like firefighters but also for linemen repairing downed lines, which are pretty common where I live (a mountainous rural area).

Given that these store-bought panels are being plugged into house AC, it follows that they have built-in inverters. Many grid-tied inverters are “grid follow”, meaning that they adjust themselves to grid frequency/phase. So, just speculating here… maybe the inverter senses when the mains go down and turns itself off? I would love to know from an EE what is actually happening wrt safety.

在 HN 中查看
cillian64 2026/04/01 20:54
它将与屋顶太阳能的大型逆变器相同——它们不断监控电源周期，如果电压（或者可能频率也？）超出范围，它们就会关闭，更不用说完全掉电了。 英国的相关标准是G98/G99。
It'll be the same as larger inverters for roof-top solar - they are constantly monitoring the mains cycle and will shut off if the voltage (or probably frequency too?) goes out of range, let alone drops out entirely. The relevant standards in the UK are G98/G99.
在 HN 中查看
raphaelj 2026/04/01 20:54
如果这些逆变器无法检测到电网信号，或者电网频率/电压超出安全范围，则必须关闭。

与非即插即用逆变器相同的立法。

These inverters have to switch off if they cannot detect a grid signal, or if the grid frequency/voltage goes out of the safe range.

Same legislation as the non-plug&play inverters.

在 HN 中查看
mnmalst 2026/04/01 21:30
这是否意味着如果您的主电网停电，太阳能电池板也无法为您的房屋供电？
Does this mean if you have a main grid power outage the solar panel cannot provide your house with power either?
在 HN 中查看
Confiks 2026/04/01 22:15
不一定，但大多数逆变器（至少在欧洲）并不是设计成在没有电网的情况下运行的。

Victron 等逆变器品牌的某些型号（除了自给自足的利基之外并不常见，因为它们相当昂贵，有时还很复杂）可以形成微电网。他们可以选择特殊的断路器 [1]，如果检测到电网出现故障，该断路器会将逆变器与电网断开，从而允许在停电期间使用它们。

[1] https://www.victronenergy.com/accessories/anti-islanding-box...

Not necessarily, but most inverters (in Europe, at least) aren't designed to function without a grid anyway.

Some models of inverter brands like Victron (which isn't very common outside its niche of self-sufficiency because they are rather expensive and sometimes complex) can form a micro-grid. They have the option of a special circuit breaker [1] that decouples the inverter from the grid if the grid is detected to be down, which allows their use during a power outage.

[1] https://www.victronenergy.com/accessories/anti-islanding-box...

在 HN 中查看
raphaelj 2026/04/01 23:04
我的（Ecoflow Stream Ultra）有两个 1200W 常规插座，我可以在电网停电时使用。
Mine (Ecoflow Stream Ultra) has two 1200W regular sockets I can use while the grid down.
在 HN 中查看
raddan 2026/04/01 21:36
是的。
Yes.
在 HN 中查看
singularity2001 2026/04/01 20:40

Wouldn't it make much more sense to deliver them with a battery? How would you connect a battery to such system?
在 HN 中查看
ajb 2026/04/01 21:19
英国法规更新[1]提到了电池，但你必须付费，所以我不知道详细信息。

看来您可以在本月 15 日合法安装其中一个面板，但可能还没有任何经过认证符合销售法规的面板。

[1] https://electrical.theiet.org/amendment-4-updates-to-18th-ed...

The UK regs update[1] mentions a battery, but you have to pay for it so I don't have the details.

It appears your could legally install one of these panels on the 15th of this month, but there presumably won't be any certified to comply with the regs on sale yet.

[1] https://electrical.theiet.org/amendment-4-updates-to-18th-ed...

pjc50 2026/04/01 22:34
电池仍然相对昂贵、又大又重；面板非常便宜。
Batteries are still relatively expensive, large and heavy; panels are extremely cheap.
在 HN 中查看
gcanyon 2026/04/01 20:18
对于任何好奇的人来说，质量/产量似乎差异很大。以下是 Project Farm 对一些较小面板的视频回顾： https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bVkJKCoRATs
For anyone curious, it appears that quality/output varies widely. Here's a video review of some smaller panels by Project Farm: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bVkJKCoRATs
在 HN 中查看
timonoko 2026/04/01 20:06
上次我从 Lidl 购买面板，效果很好 仅在阳光明媚的日子。很奇怪。

检查发现它有两个并联的 6 伏 10 瓦面板，然后是 12V 至 5V USB 转换器。

当面板重新串联连接时，一切正常。

Last time I bought a panel from Lidl, it worked only on very sunny day. Very Strange.

Inspection revealed it had two 6 Volt 10 Watt panels in parallel and then 12V to 5V USB-converter.

When panels were reconnected in series it was quite OK.

在 HN 中查看
muskstinks 2026/04/01 20:08
你是什​​么意思？您是指用于智能手机的小型太阳能电池板吗？因为文章中的面板有一平方米以上大。我的在晴天时可产生 200-400 瓦的功率
What do you mean? Do you mean small solar panel for smartphones? Because the panels in the article are over a square meter big. Mine make 200-400 watts on sunny days
在 HN 中查看
timonoko 2026/04/01 20:15
是的。但20W面板也是面板。

很少有人担心 Lidl 在更大范围内的质量。

Yes. But 20W panel is panel too.

Little worried about Lidl-quality also on larger scale.

在 HN 中查看
muskstinks 2026/04/01 21:41
那完全是两件不同的事情。

不同的公司，不同的制造方法和不同的组件。例如，逆变器是普通光伏发电的最大成本，面板本身是玻璃和铝，而不是环氧树脂或塑料。

Thats competly two different things.

Different companies, different manufactoring methods and different components. The inverter is the biggest cost at normal PVs for example, the panel itself is glas and alumnimum and not epoxy or plastic.

在 HN 中查看
hkpack 2026/04/01 19:46
我尝试以类似的方式在我的阳台上安装 Bluetti 太阳能电池板，但由于与太阳的角度不同，效率非常低。

我想知道它在实践中对多少人有效？

在屋顶上安装面板应该会更有效率......

I tried to set up Bluetti solar panel on my balcony in a similar way, but the efficiency was abysmal because of the angle to the sun.

I wonder for how many people it will work in practice?

Putting panels on the roof should be much more efficient…

在 HN 中查看
pjc50 2026/04/01 22:31
> 将面板放在屋顶上应该会更有效率

是的，但它也贵得多。

> Putting panels on the roof should be much more efficient

Yes, but it's also much more expensive.

在 HN 中查看
aitchnyu 2026/04/01 22:49
请告知您的纬度或位置。
Please tell your latitude or location.
在 HN 中查看
mememememememo 2026/04/01 20:01
将其插入插座有什么危险吗？

它需要自己的地球吗？如果检测到剩余电流会关闭吗？它可以处理负载峰值吗？

Any dangers from plugging this in to a socket?

Does it need its own earth? Will it switch off if it detects a residual current? Can it handle spikes in load?

在 HN 中查看
muskstinks 2026/04/01 20:10
不，您的普通插座可以以相反的方式使用而不会出现问题，并且反向负载不会产生问题。

它甚至可以减少主线上的负载，因为能量直接流入下一个消费者。

德国插座有地线，没问题。它具有保护机制，如果无法同步到电网，则会关闭。这些面板仅产生（峰值！）400-800 瓦。那不是问题。

No your normal socket can be used the other way around without issues and that reverse load doesn't create a problem.

Its even reducing your load on your main line beause the energy directly flows into the next consumer.

German socket has earth, thats fine. It has protection mechanism and shuts down if it can't sync to the powergrid. The panels only produce (in peak!) 400-800 watts. Thats not an issue.

在 HN 中查看
muskstinks 2026/04/01 19:30
我的阳台上有一个。 400 欧元，节省了我 10% 的电费。

运作良好，现在可能已经再融资。

I have one on my balcony. 400 Euros and it saves me 10% of my energy bill.

works well and is probably now refinanced.

在 HN 中查看
lnsru 2026/04/01 19:36
哪个能源账单？每月还是每年？
Which energy bill? Monthly or yearly?
在 HN 中查看
progbits 2026/04/01 19:42
关于百分比的美好事物......
Beautiful thing about percentages...
在 HN 中查看
oneeyedpigeon 2026/04/01 19:47
是的，“你的能源账单的 10% 是多少”将是一个更有用的问题！
Yeah, "how much is 10% of your energy bill" would be a much more useful question!
在 HN 中查看
fragmede 2026/04/02 00:48
大约10%！
about 10%!
在 HN 中查看
tbrownaw 2026/04/01 20:05
好吧，“每年”、“夏天每月”和“冬天每月”似乎都是不同的数字。
Well, "yearly", "monthly, in the summer", and "monthly, in the winter" could plausibly all be different numbers.
在 HN 中查看
latexr 2026/04/01 19:49
这是同样的事情。假设您的账单为 120 欧元/年。平均为 10 欧元/月（120 欧元除以 12 个月）。如果您每月节省 10%，则可节省 1 欧元，12 个月后将节省 12 欧元。现在每年都这样做：120 欧元的 10% 是……12 欧元。
It’s the same thing. Say you have a bill of 120€/year. On average that comes to 10€/month (120€ divided by 12 months). If you have save 10% a month you save 1€, which after 12 months becomes a saving of 12€. Now do that yearly: 10% of 120€ is… 12€.
在 HN 中查看
citrin_ru 2026/04/01 20:01
7 月或 8 月每月账单的 10% 的节省将导致全年的节省不到 10%，因为冬季太阳能输出较低。
10% of saving for July's or August monthly bill will give less than 10% saving for the year as in the winter solar output is lower.
在 HN 中查看
muskstinks 2026/04/01 20:12
我每月支付 100 欧元的电费并节省 10%，因此每月 10 欧元或每年 120 欧元。
I pay 100 Euros per month energy bill and save 10% of it so 10 Euros per month or 120 Euros per year.
在 HN 中查看
Markoff 2026/04/01 23:36
您是否正在经营比特币农场或用电做饭和取暖，每月账单为 100 欧元？我全家4口人的年耗电量约为1.2MWh（燃气烹饪和外部电网中央供暖），这使得捷克每年<400欧元（因欧洲高电价而臭名昭著），现在我的大部分费用已经不是我的消费，而是配电和其他东西，更糟糕的是我的燃气烹饪每年只有0.5MWh，我几乎只支付固定费用而不是实际消耗，但尝试电磁炉烹饪并讨厌它
are you running bitcoin farm or cook and heat with electricity with 100 eur monthly bill? my yearly consumption for whole household of 4 people is around 1.2MWh (gas cooking, and external grid central heating), which makes like <400EUR per year in Czechia (infamous for high electricity prices across Europe) and already now most of my fees are not really my consumption, but distribution and other stuff, it's even worse with my gas cooking with only 0.5MWh per year, where I paid almost only fixed fees and not the actual consumption, but tried cooking on induction and hated it
在 HN 中查看
pjc50 2026/04/02 00:33
英国监管机构使用的平均消费数据 https://www.ofgem.gov.uk/average-gas-and-electricity-use-exp... 对于一个“小”家庭来说，天然气是 7.5MWh，天然气是 1.8MWh，所以我猜你真的很节俭和/或绝缘良好？
The average consumption figures used by the UK regulator https://www.ofgem.gov.uk/average-gas-and-electricity-use-exp... are 7.5MWh gas and 1.8MWh for a "small" household, so I guess you're really frugal and/or well insulated?
在 HN 中查看
muskstinks 2026/04/01 23:47
不，只是一台 24/7 运行的普通服务器、一台冷凝式烘干机、一台游戏设备并在家工作（因此显示器、灯光和 kvm 交换机 8/5 运行）。

每月 240 千瓦时，每千瓦时 35 美分，底价 10 欧元。

Nope just a normal server running 24/7, a condens dryer, a gaming rig and working from home (so display, lights and kvm switch running 8/5).

240kWh per month, 35cent per kWh and a base price of 10 Euros.

在 HN 中查看
gib444 2026/04/01 19:56
我的意思并不是轻率的：你绝对不能相信普通英国人能够将这些安全地安装在阳台上。

如果他们认为可以多获得一盎司的阳光，他们就会把它挂在边缘，非常糟糕

I don't mean this lightly: you absolutely can not trust the average Brit to safely install these on a balcony.

If they think they can get an ounce more sunshine, they'll hang it over the edge, badly

在 HN 中查看
Fokamul 2026/04/01 19:58
你们国家是如何处理这个问题的？ 我们仅讨论直接插入主电源的太阳能电池板。

因为在这里，欧盟的小国，这是不允许的，因为这意味着对电力基础设施的荒谬投资。

它受到严格的监管，你需要特殊的电表、许可证等，而且一天中的某些时间电价仍然是负数，因为每个有能力的人都从欧盟补贴中获得了太阳能发电厂。

How is this handled in your country? We're talking only about solar panels which plugs directly into your main.

Because here, small country in EU, this is not allowed since it would mean ridiculous investment into electric infrastructure.

It's heavily regulated and you need special electric meter, license, etc. and still price of electricity is negative in certain times during the day, because everyone who could, got their solar power plant from EU subsidies.

在 HN 中查看
bildung 2026/04/01 20:11
在德国，电力基础设施的投资为零，但此类系统允许从电池板流入电网的功率目前限制为 800W。似乎工作正常。更大的系统仍然需要许可证。
In Germany there was zero investment into the electric infrastructure, but the power allowed to flow from the panels into the grid is currently limited to 800W for this type of system. Seems to work fine. Larger systems still need a license.
在 HN 中查看
Hamuko 2026/04/01 20:16
看来他们在芬兰是非法的。

https://tukes.fi/-/ala-kayta-pistorasiaan-kytkettavaa-aurink...

如果您想要太阳能电池板而无需找电工，则需要将它们连接到未连接到电源的电池。

Seems like they're illegal as hell in Finland.

https://tukes.fi/-/ala-kayta-pistorasiaan-kytkettavaa-aurink...

If you want solar panels without having to get an electrician, you'd need to connect them to a battery that's not connected to the mains.

在 HN 中查看
yostrovs 2026/04/01 19:57
过去几周我一直看到此类头条新闻。这表明欧洲正在为下一次霍尔木兹海峡被封锁做好准备。但除了节省公寓 10% 的电费之外，还有其他实际行动吗？ 是否有大规模的缓解措施能够真正减轻另一次能源短缺的影响？
I've been seeing headlines of this sort last few weeks. It points to Europe preparing for the next time the Hormuz is blocked off. But are there actual actions taken beyond those that save 10 percent on an apartment's electricity bills? Are there large scale mitigation measures that would actually soften the impact of another energy shortage in a serious way?
在 HN 中查看
afh1 2026/04/01 20:00
为什么欧洲人需要获得州长的许可才能购买太阳能电池板？我敢打赌，即使您减轻了基础设施需求，您也需要为所产生的能源纳税。
Why do Europeans need permission from their governors to buy solar panels? I bet you also need to pay taxes on the energy you generate even though you alleviate the infrastructure need.
在 HN 中查看
kstenerud 2026/04/01 20:12
因为这些“管理者”首先需要确保他们的电网和家庭电力系统能够处理太阳能系统注入家庭电力系统的情况。

你说得好像那是一件坏事一样。我不想让人们不小心烧毁他们的房子。

一旦某个地区获得批准，您就可以前往当地的商店，购买经过批准的光伏系统，然后将其插入。不用大惊小怪，不用担心，您的保险公司必须承保。

Because those "governors" need to first ensure that their grids and home electrical systems are equipped to handle a solar system pumping into the house power system.

You speak as though that were a bad thing. I'd rather not have people accidentally burning their houses down.

Once it's approved for an area, you go to your local shop, buy an approved PV system, and plug it in. No fuss, no worries, and your insurer must cover it.

在 HN 中查看
lukaslalinsky 2026/04/01 20:18
您需要获得许可才能将其连接到电网。
You need permission to connect it to the grid.
在 HN 中查看
Markoff 2026/04/01 23:38
如果您不想将其连接到电网并在孤岛模式下使用它怎么办？似乎这不应该是任何人的事
what if you don't want to connect it to grid and use it in islanding mode? seems like it shouldn't be anyone's business
在 HN 中查看
mememememememo 2026/04/01 20:03
如果您对产生的能源缴税，他们将不得不让您将电池板的成本折旧作为成本。有趣的是它落在哪里以及它是否能带来大量税收。
If you pay tax on generated energy they would have to let you deprecate the cost of the panel as a cost. Would be interesting as to where that lands and if it makes much tax revenue at all.
在 HN 中查看
pjc50 2026/04/01 20:15
各地都有电气安全法规。
Everywhere has electrical safety regulations.
在 HN 中查看
Fokamul 2026/04/01 20:08
我认为这是荒谬的误解，从来没有听说过在欧盟不能购买太阳能电池板。

这篇文章是关于将太阳能电池板插入主电源的许可。

例如：欧盟小国，绝对不允许，并处以巨额罚款。没有适当的设备、太阳能发电厂许可证等。

I think this is ridiculous misconception, never heard of that you cannot buy solar panels in EU.

The post is about permission to plug solar panels into your main electricity.

Eg.: Small EU country, definitely not allowed and under huge fines. Without proper equipment, solar power plant license etc. etc.

在 HN 中查看
